description: Style Note With the temperatures soaring, your fashion choices demand style and comfort. This white dress from tonga is a must buy. With a stylish cut and a well fitted bodice, this dress would look great worn with high heels. Choose chic accessories to complete your look. Product Details A black dress with a ballet wrap V neckline, has a broad patch at the waist with black crystal embellishments, gathers from waist down, a tie up sash at the back and batwing short sleeves Material and Care 62% polyester, 35% rayon and 3% spandex Machine wash cold Do not bleach Tumble dry low Wash and iron inside out and do not iron over decorations Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
